title: Woodworks Quark Compat
description: Adds sawmill recipes for Quark's wood types and resolves recipe overlap.
body:
# Features:

Adds Sawmill recipes for Ancient (Ashen), Azalea and Blossom (Trumpet) wood types, and new Quark utility recipes (revertable chests and logs to chests) for Woodworks (and other Team Abnormals mods) wooden chests.

Resolves recipe overlap: if ignore-anti overlap for variant chests/ladders/bookshelves is turned on in Quark's config and wooden chests/ladders/bookshelves is set to true in Woodworks' config, all of Quark's conflicting recipes are disabled (because ancient, azalea and blossom chests/ladders/bookshelves also get disabled if ignore anti-overlap is turned off).

All recipes respect Woodworks' and Quark's configs.

# Requirements:

[Woodworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodworks) and [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) (obviously). You can also use [Every Compat (Wood Good)](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat) for the Ancient, Azalea and Blossom boards it adds (which are supported by this datapack).
